name: quanthunt-prototype
description: QuantHunt stock screener prototype - Flask backend + single-file HTML UI

scripts.setup: python3 -m venv venv && venv/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip && venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.setup:win: python -m venv venv && venv\Scripts\python -m pip install --upgrade pip && venv\Scripts\pip install -r requirements.txt

author: alexOutcastX
